CapabilityDomains.name: Application Launch
CapabilityDomains.description: Open configured, trusted, or confirmed local applications.

CapabilityDomains.name: URL Opening
CapabilityDomains.description: Open safe HTTP or HTTPS URLs.

CapabilityDomains.name: Tool Discovery
CapabilityDomains.description: List implemented tools and their examples.

CapabilityDomains.name: Diagnostics
CapabilityDomains.description: Report Merlin backend health, status, and runtime diagnostics.

CapabilityDomains.name: Confirmation
CapabilityDomains.description: Confirm and execute pending safe actions.

CapabilityDomains.name: General Conversation
CapabilityDomains.description: Handle safe conversational interaction using the local AI model.

CapabilityDomains.name: System Timezone
CapabilityDomains.description: Read the local system timezone.

CapabilityDomains.name: System Date
CapabilityDomains.description: Read the current local system date.

CapabilityDomains.name: System Time
CapabilityDomains.description: Read the current local system time.

CapabilityDomains.name: Time
CapabilityDomains.description: Tell the current time, date, or timezone-aware time.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you're asking for the current time, but I don't currently have a dedicated TimeTool for that request.

CapabilityDomains.name: News
CapabilityDomains.description: Retrieve current news, headlines, or news feeds.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you're looking for news, but I don't currently have a News capability implemented. To make this possible, Merlin would need a NewsTool or WebSearch capability.

CapabilityDomains.name: Web Search
CapabilityDomains.description: Search public web results and return source titles, URLs, domains, and snippets.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you want web search, but web search is not configured yet.

CapabilityDomains.name: Web Research
CapabilityDomains.description: Fetch, scan, and synthesize public web sources with citations.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you want source-aware web research, but I only have basic web search implemented so far.

CapabilityDomains.name: Codex Research
CapabilityDomains.description: Read the current repo and compare it with external documentation.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you want repo-aware research, but Merlin does not currently have a Codex research capability wired in.

CapabilityDomains.name: Codex Implementation
CapabilityDomains.description: Make code changes in the current repository after explicit implementation intent.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you want repository changes, but Merlin does not currently have an implementation capability wired in.

CapabilityDomains.name: Memory Lookup
CapabilityDomains.description: Search prior conversation or saved memory.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you want me to look through prior conversation memory, but explicit memory lookup is not implemented as a routed capability yet.

CapabilityDomains.name: Email
CapabilityDomains.description: Read, search, or send email.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you want email access, but I don't currently have an Email capability implemented.

CapabilityDomains.name: Calendar
CapabilityDomains.description: Read or manage calendar events.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you want calendar access, but I don't currently have a Calendar capability implemented.

CapabilityDomains.name: File Access
CapabilityDomains.description: Inspect folders, files, drives, desktop, downloads, or documents.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you're asking me to inspect folders, but I don't currently have a file access capability implemented.

CapabilityDomains.name: System Settings
CapabilityDomains.description: Change operating system settings or security configuration.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you're asking for system settings control, but Merlin does not currently support changing system settings.

CapabilityDomains.name: Software Installation
CapabilityDomains.description: Install, download, update, or remove software.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you're asking to install or update software, but Merlin does not support software installation.

CapabilityDomains.name: Destructive File Action
CapabilityDomains.description: Delete, wipe, format, or destructively modify files or drives.
CapabilityDomains.missingMessage: I understand you're asking me to delete files, but Merlin does not support destructive file actions. This protects your data from accidental or unsafe changes.
